feed.title: Rocasta Dot Com
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Useful Unix
entry.summary:
Table of Contents
Useful Find
Converting xlsx files to csv Deleting recursive files &amp; directory structure Deleting recursive files but leaving directory structure Finding empty directories and deleting them Deleting files of a certain size Removes all files older than and including &lt;file&gt; To display filename and line count minus 1 for csv files (well, any text file) To remove whites...

entry.title: Bash Operators Cheat Sheet
entry.summary:
Table of Contents
1. 1. File Test Operators 2. 2. String Comparison Operators 3. 3. Numeric Comparison Operators 4. 4. Logical Operators 5. 5. Arithmetic Operators 6. 6. Assignment Operators 7. 7. Bitwise Operators 8. 8. Process Control Operators 9. Conclusion
This cheat sheet covers Bash operators including file tests, string comparisons, logical operations, and arithmetic evaluations.
...

This cheat sheet covers Bash operators including file tests, string comparisons, logical operations, and arithmetic evaluations.

entry.title: Building a Gigabyte Brix SUSE Distro

link.title: Building a Gigabyte Brix SUSE Distro

entry.summary:
Table of Contents
Enable SSH
Firewall
Configuring GRUB for Headless Boot Apache
Installing Apache Configuring Apache
Download the latest copy of SUSE tumbleweed
Burn this ISO image to thumb drive
dd if=&lt;location_of_iso&gt; of=/dev/rdisk&lt;thumbdrive_disk_number&gt; bs=1m
Put this in the front USB slot of the Brix
Power off and power on (a hard reboot is important...
